dimensions.name: behavior_preservation
dimensions.title: Behavior Preservation
dimensions.description: All existing tests still pass, no regressions, observable behavior unchanged

dimensions.name: code_clarity
dimensions.title: Code Clarity
dimensions.description: Code is cleaner, more readable, and better organized after refactoring

dimensions.name: refactoring_technique
dimensions.title: Refactoring Technique
dimensions.description: Correct application of refactoring patterns (Extract Method, Extract Class, Replace Conditional with Polymorphism, etc.)

dimensions.name: scope_discipline
dimensions.title: Scope Discipline
dimensions.description: Changed only what was needed, no unnecessary modifications, no feature creep
